name: hydrate
description: Shared local memory for the coding agent.

interface.shortDescription: Persistent local memory for ChatGPT + Codex.
interface.longDescription: Hydrate gives the agent a persistent memory layer that lives entirely on the local machine. On the agentic surfaces (Codex, Work, CLI, IDE) it wires lifecycle hooks: relevant facts, canon, and prior-session context are injected before each prompt (UserPromptSubmit / SessionStart) and the session is captured on completion (Stop) — zero user friction. Everywhere plugins run, the bundled MCP server exposes explicit tools (hydrate_recall, hydrate_save_fact, hydrate_session_resume, …) and a skill guides their use in Chat/Work. All storage is local (~/.hydrate/data.db); nothing leaves the machine.
